overall.description: A first-person walk across a futuristic cable-stayed bridge in a cyberpunk metropolis (Cyberpunk 2077), showcasing towering corporate skyscrapers, holographic billboards, flying vehicles, and a bright morning sun over the city of Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic cable-stayed bridge walkway approaching city center

events.description: flying vehicle (AV) passes overhead in the distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the bridge walkway toward the distant corporate skyline, passing palm trees

entered.detail: tall cable-stayed bridge tower with suspension cables rising above the roadway
tropical palm trees lining the right side of the bridge approach
large overhead bridge structure with billboards spanning across the road
modern street lamp with orange fixture
distinctive futuristic corporate skyscraper with circular architecture in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking along a futuristic bridge toward a dense cyberpunk skyline. Palm trees line the right side while the cable-stayed bridge tower looms ahead. A flying vehicle passes overhead, and the bright morning sun illuminates the clean concrete walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway under overhead billboard gantry

events.description: passing under the large overhead billboard gantry, entering semi-covered area with shadow
futuristic silver sedan and pink sports car pass by on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: continuing forward under the overhead structure, observing the digital billboards above

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving past on the bridge road

entered.detail: large digital screen displaying advertisements on the overhead gantry
holographic billboard with purple 'DREAM' text and anime-style character
metal safety railing along the left side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: The camera passes under a massive overhead gantry covered in digital billboards, temporarily shading the walkway. The lighting shifts to mixed as futuristic vehicles pass by on the right. The bridge railing becomes prominent on the left as the walk continues toward the city center.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway alongside corporate towers with river view

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the waterway and bridge structure below

agents.ego_description: walking past corporate buildings while looking up at the Jinguji tower and then toward the waterway

entered.detail: tall corporate building with prominent 'JINGUJI' signage and gold accents
large vertical billboard displaying 'AVANTE' with romantic imagery
wide river or bay below the bridge with calm water

segments.scene_description: Exiting the covered area, the scene opens to reveal the Jinguji corporate building on the left with its distinctive signage. The camera continues forward, then pans to show the waterway below and the bridge structure extending across it. The cable-stayed tower now appears in the distance to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge walkway with panoramic waterway and city views

events.description: view transitions to focus on the waterway and distant bridge structure across the river

agents.ego_description: walking along the bridge with expansive views of the waterway and distant cityscape

entered.detail: yellow-painted bridge support structure visible across the water
tall modern glass office towers reflecting the sunlight

segments.scene_description: The camera moves along the bridge with the waterway now prominent on the left. Glass skyscrapers rise in the distance across the water, while the yellow bridge structure spans the river. The scene is bright and open with clear views of the distant city architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: bridge approach facing bright sunrise with traffic

events.description: bright sun glare intensifies as camera faces directly toward the light source
yellow sports car drives past on the adjacent road

agents.ego_description: walking toward the bright sunlight at the end of the bridge, squinting against the glare

notable_agents.action: yellow sports car speeding past toward the city center

entered.detail: building with NCPD signage indicating police presence
intense sunlight creating lens flare and bright glare ahead

segments.scene_description: The final segment faces directly into the bright morning sun, creating a strong backlit effect and lens flare. The camera approaches the end of the bridge with glass towers silhouetted against the light. A yellow sports car passes by on the left, and the NCPD building becomes visible as the walk continues toward the city.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk across a futuristic cable-stayed bridge that transitions from a palm-lined approach into the heart of a blindingly bright corporate skyline. It begins on a clean concrete walkway under a morning sun, moving past palm trees as a flying vehicle passes overhead toward a looming bridge tower. As the camera passes under a massive overhead gantry, the lighting shifts to a shaded mix of digital billboard glows and passing traffic before opening up again to reveal the Jinguji corporate building and the waterway below. The scene then expands across the yellow bridge structure, with the camera panning to showcase glass skyscrapers rising across the water. Finally, the view turns directly into the intense morning sun, creating a strong lens flare that silhouettes the distant towers and the NCPD building as a yellow sports car speeds past.
